## Problem

Describe the concrete user, security, or interoperability problem.

## Change

Describe the smallest behavior change that resolves the problem.

## Evidence

- [ ] Added or updated tests
- [ ] `npm run verify` passes
- [ ] Gas or bytecode changes are explained
- [ ] Threat model, architecture, or decision record updated when required

## Security review

List changes to authority, trust assumptions, external dependencies, recovery,
privacy, EntryPoint behavior, or compatibility claims. Write `none` when the
change has no such effect.

## Residual risks

State what remains unproven or intentionally deferred.
